Thought:
To determine whether the two time series share the same underlying distribution, I will analyze their statistical properties, such as central tendency, dispersion, and noise characteristics. As "Gaussian White Noise" is mentioned, I will specifically test for stationarity and noise profiles to understand whether both series exhibit characteristics of Gaussian White Noise.

Action:
tool: [stationarity_test], tool_input: {"test": "adf"}

Observation:
tool: [stationarity_test],
